reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para descansar estirar las piernas ,sanitarios limpios buena atencion ,cargamos los celu y inflamos las ruedas de la moto siempre paramos ahi

(Translated by Google)
Good place to rest and stretch your legs, clean restrooms, good service, we charge our phones and inflate our motorcycle tires, we always stop there

reviews.comment:
no tienen cuenta DNI con lo cual la famosa promoción de esta herramienta de los jueves, no la pude realizar. Lo demás, común, sin mayores observaciones.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a DNI account, so I couldn't take advantage of the popular Thursday promotion for this tool. Otherwise, everything was normal, with no further issues.

reviews.comment:
FALTA LIMPIEZA EN LOS BAÑOS . NO SE PUEDEN ELEGIR LA MAYORIA DE LOS PRODUCTO POR QUE NO DEJAN PASAR , SE PUEDEN BER A MAS DE 2 METRO . NO HAY PRECIOS A LA VISTA.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are not clean. You can't choose most products because they won't let you in. They can be seen more than 2 meters away. There are no visible prices.

reviews.comment:
Pesima comida.!! venden sandwich "LaIdeal"   q son ideales para pasar hambre.! tienen 3 capas de pan de miga y una piel de cebolla como jamon y queso.! MUY MALA CALIDAD, en un lugar hermoso. Si no quieren turistas....bueno...CIERREN.! Nadie los va a extrañar.!  NO VUELVO MAS.!(tampoco creo q le importe mucho al titular de la franquicia, sino ofrecería productos de mejor calidad, no esa *cosa" incomible q llaman sandwich "laideal'.   #@#_+&& !!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible food!! They sell "La Ideal" sandwiches that are perfect for starving yourself! They have three layers of white bread and onion skin instead of ham and cheese! VERY BAD QUALITY, in a beautiful location. If they don't want tourists... well... CLOSE DOWN! Nobody will miss them! I'M NEVER COMING BACK! (I don't think the franchise owner cares much either, otherwise they'd offer better quality products, not that inedible *thing* they call a "La Ideal" sandwich. #@#_+&& !!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5OEtIazNBRRAB
